debug_info.goal:
G : Type u_1
inst✝² : AddCommGroup G
inst✝¹ : Fintype G
inst✝ : Module (ZMod 2) G
A : Set G
⊢ ∃ φ, Nat.card ↑{x | x ∈ A ∧ φ x = 1} ≥ (Nat.card ↑A - 1) / 2

proof:
obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ | h := Set.nonempty_or_eq_empty A
  · have : Nat.card {φ : G →+ ZMod 2 | φ x = 1} = Nat.card G / 2 := card_of_dual_constrained x (by simp)
    have : ∃ φ, Nat.card {x | x ∈ A ∧ φ x = 1} ≥ (Nat.card A - 1) / 2 := by
      refine ⟨Classical.choose (exists_ne x), ?_⟩
      simp [Nat.div_le_div_right (Nat.sub_le_sub_right (Nat.card_mono (Set.toFinite _) (by simp)) 1)]
    exact this
  · simp [h]
